# 27장: 프로덕션급 AI 코딩 패턴

<span class="projection-status status-public">public</span> **신뢰도:** `high`

## 공개 SDK 기준 재작성

공개판에서 production pattern은 sandbox, permissions, evals, prompt versioning, CI/PR integration, incident response, observability로 정리한다. managed agents와 SRE notebooks는 local prototype을 운영 workflow로 연결하는 예제다.


## Cookbook 근거

- [Managed Agents production setup](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/managed_agents/CMA_operate_in_production.ipynb)
- [Iterate on failing tests](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/managed_agents/CMA_iterate_fix_failing_tests.ipynb)
- [Site reliability agent](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/claude_agent_sdk/03_The_site_reliability_agent.ipynb)
- [Hosting your agent](https://github.com/nfbs2000/speaky-claude-cookbooks/blob/main/claude_agent_sdk/07_Hosting_the_agent.ipynb)

## 공식 문서

- [Hosting the Agent SDK](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/agent-sdk/hosting.md)
- [Securely deploying AI agents](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/agent-sdk/secure-deployment.md)
- [Claude Code GitHub Actions](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/github-actions.md)

## 공개 경계

- demo notebook은 그대로 production SLA를 보장하지 않는다.
- write-capable agents는 rollback, approval, audit가 필요하다.

## 실습 방향

- prototype notebook을 production checklist로 승격하는 gap analysis를 작성한다.
